SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ZACHARY MITCHELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITCHELL, ZACHARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP GEARY COURTYARD ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
